page_content:
LGBT488

Seminar in Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, and Transgender Studies

Elective Courses 1

Total Credits

1 Elective Courses: Students must take three electives, at least two of

which must be upper division. Electives must cover at least two of the following six thematic areas. Courses may be designated by the faculty who are teaching them as covering more than one of these areas. Students may also request that courses be counted as covering one or more areas. 1. Arts, Technology and Cultural Production

2. Transnational Politics and Perspectives

3. Institutions, Politics,and/or Social Movements

4. Race, Ethnicity, and Class

5. Transgender Studies

6. Queer and/or Feminist Theory
